sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ رِيَادَةُ الْأَعْمَالِ رُوحًا مُبْتَكِرَةً وَقُدْرَةً عَالِيَةً عَلَى تَحَمُّلِ الْمَخَاطِرِ الْمَحْسُوبَةِ فِي سُوقٍ مُتَقَلِّبَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Poduzetništvo zahtijeva inovativan duh i visoku sposobnost podnošenja proračunatih rizika na promjenljivom tržištu.
sentences.translationEn: Entrepreneurship requires an innovative spirit and a high ability to take calculated risks in a volatile market.

sentences.arabic: يَسْعَى رُوَّادُ الْأَعْمَالِ إِلَى إِيجَادِ حُلُولٍ إِبْدَاعِيَّةٍ لِلْمُشْكِلَاتِ الَّتِي تُوَاجِهُ الْمُجْتَمَعَ، مِمَّا يُسَاهِمُ فِي دَفْعِ عَجَلَةِ الِاقْتِصَادِ.
sentences.translation: Poduzetnici nastoje pronaći kreativna rješenja za probleme s kojima se društvo suočava, što doprinosi pokretanju točka ekonomije.
sentences.translationEn: Entrepreneurs seek to find creative solutions to the problems facing society, which contributes to driving the economy forward.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ بِنَاءَ شَرِكَةٍ نَاشِئَةٍ نَاجِحَةٍ لَيْسَ بِالْأَمْرِ الْهَيِّنِ، إِذْ يَسْتَلْزِمُ ذَلِكَ صَبْرًا طَوِيلًا وَتَخْطِيطًا اسْتْرَاتِيجيًّا دَقِيقًا.
sentences.translation: Izgradnja uspješnog startupa nije laka stvar, jer to zahtijeva dugo strpljenje i precizno strateško planiranje.
sentences.translationEn: Building a successful startup is no easy feat, as it requires long patience and meticulous strategic planning.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْتَثْمِرِ الشَّابِّ أَنْ يُحِيطَ نَفْسَهُ بِفَرِيقِ عَمَلٍ مُتَكَامِلٍ يَمْتَلِكُ الْخِبْرَةَ وَالشَّغَفَ لِتَحْقِيقِ الرُّؤْيَةِ الْمُشْتَرَكَةِ.
sentences.translation: Mladi investitor mora se okružiti integrisanim radnim timom koji posjeduje iskustvo i strast za postizanje zajedničke vizije.
sentences.translationEn: A young investor must surround himself with an integrated work team that possesses the experience and passion to achieve the shared vision.

sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الْمُرُونَةُ فِي التَّعَامُلِ مَعَ الْإِخْفَاقَاتِ جُزْءًا لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مِنْ رِحْلَةِ النَّجَاحِ فِي عَالَمِ التِّجَارَةِ وَالْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Fleksibilnost u suočavanju s neuspjesima smatra se neodvojivim dijelom puta ka uspjehu u svijetu trgovine i finansija.
sentences.translationEn: Flexibility in dealing with failures is considered an integral part of the journey to success in the world of business and finance.
